name: figma-extension
description: Orchestrator for the backend, extension, and figma-plugin sub-projects (each has its own package.json).

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix extension install && npm --prefix figma-plugin install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,extension,plugin -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix extension run dev" "npm --prefix figma-plugin run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix extension run build && npm --prefix figma-plugin run build
